gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用声音跨越生死与距离的浪漫，笑泪交织的惊喜之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A delightful romantic comedy where voicemails to a deceased sister accidentally connect two souls across distance and grief.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温暖怪咖爱情、不介意笑中带泪的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of quirky, heartfelt romances like Love Actually who enjoy laughter mixed with tears.
